content: AirConsole table stakes: smartphone as controller with no additional hardware, QR code or short code room join, multiplayer (up to 30 players), instant browser-based access (no app install), cross-platform, game library. Key differentiators include device motion/gyroscope access, haptic vibrate(), secret info per player screen, context-specific controller views. The platform handles device pairing, networking, and hosting. Design principle: smartphones are not gamepads — avoid virtual joysticks, maximize touch target sizes.
